authority: brief 7A Amendment 6 (the disposition — LAW); Amendment 5 untouched; Stage-D records sha 9b03cb5bbc5d87fe36324dd5ebd9a531d8bf0b00230133e7294aec4d8883c175 (commit bc27583)

classifier_spec.consistency_cross_check: for every cell: lane set-equality certified => raw_a - raw_b == (account difference of member a) - (account difference of member b) in Q (for C: via the raw-only identities). FINGERPRINTED <=> that difference is nonzero. Any inconsistency = classifier defect => leg FAIL.

distinguishing_ops.C: all account entries (sqrt routes share no ops); residues from the HR132 upsilon account (exact_upsilon, consumed - sqrt is PAIR_EXACT, residue-zero test is pair r == 0)
distinguishing_ops.R1: all account entries EXCEPT the final div (numerator ops); the final div is L4-shared iff the numerator floats coincide
distinguishing_ops.R2: all account entries (no shared ops between Horner and expanded forms)

classifier_spec.grids: the Stage-D pinned H5 grids for R1/R2/C, plus the witness cell
classifier_spec.output: route_agreement_classification.json + summary table in the leg report
classifier_spec.status: recorded artifact, non-verdict-bearing (Amendment 6); pair-level registry + intake = fenced follow-on, NOT this leg

three_way.COINCIDENTALLY_IDENTICAL: raw_a == raw_b with nonzero distinguishing residues that cancel
three_way.FINGERPRINTED: raw_a != raw_b; account identity verified at the cell (full identity for rational members, raw-only for C)
three_way.LAWFULLY_IDENTICAL: raw_a == raw_b AND every route-distinguishing op residue is zero at every stencil node in both members; certificate = list of (op, protecting law): mul->L3_exact_product, add/sub->L1_exact_dyadic_or_L2_Sterbenz, shared final div->L4_shared_op_identity, sqrt->exact_sqrt

conditional_law: raw route fingerprints present <=> intermediate-rounding asymmetry present (Amendment 6 sharpening of the v1 registered prediction; finding #3 preserved verbatim as the protected side's mechanism)
determinism: byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records); sha-pinned; suite green at leg close.
grid_informativeness: standing law (Amendment 6): the witness cell's contrast-achievability is dry-run-verified from mechanism BEFORE the pin (P(x_w) false by L3; distinguishing residues unequal in Q; node-level raw divergence shown), recorded below at freeze.
prediction_i_witness: raw_cell(R1a) != raw_cell(R1b) at the witness cell (bit-for-bit float compare), AND the account identity Q(raw) - lane == -dev_chain + iterdiff(deltas)/h^m holds exactly for BOTH members at the witness. FAIL => chain verbatim, STOP, Will.
prediction_ii_protected: raw_cell(R1a) == raw_cell(R1b) at EVERY cell of the original pinned R1 grid (re-pinned at exactly zero raw difference; 60 cells). FAIL => chain verbatim, STOP, Will.
protection_predicate_derivation: see module docstring, recorded verbatim at freeze: P(x) from L1 exact-dyadic / L2 Sterbenz / L3 exact-product / L4 shared-op identity; operational test: EVERY route-distinguishing op residue zero at every stencil node (decided in Q by the lift's account).
scope: the H5 raw leg ONLY (Amendment 6). H4 (22/0/0/0) and the H5 exact legs (120/120, 360/360) stand CLOSED — not re-run, not touched.
